releaseSummary: Bank Payment Portals automatically receives the exact bank names configured in Innovations for EFT customers.

Customers are sent only to verified online-banking destinations; the system shows a support fallback when a source value is a placeholder, non-retail institution, or otherwise lacks a verified sign-in page.

moduleImpact.notes: Updated as part of Innovations EFT Bank Portal Directory.

migrationNotes: No manual data migration is required for this release.
